Primary Care

Ongoing care from a
provider who knows you

Routine visits, chronic condition management, and medication oversight — all from one consistent provider who reviews your history before every appointment.

Book a Visit

Routine & Preventive

  • • Annual wellness visits with comprehensive health reviews
  • • Same-week sick and acute visit appointments
  • • Age-appropriate screening lab orders and referrals

Chronic Conditions

  • • Hypertension monitoring and medication management
  • • Type 2 diabetes and pre-diabetes care with A1C monitoring
  • • Multi-condition ongoing monitoring with lab reviews

Medication Management

  • • New prescription evaluation within full health context
  • • Periodic reviews for interactions or redundant medications
  • • Refill management and dose adjustments based on labs
Conditions We Manage
HypertensionType 2 DiabetesHigh CholesterolHypothyroidismGERDPre-DiabetesAcute IllnessPreventive Screening

Ready for a provider
who knows you?

Book your first visit and start building a real relationship with your care team.

Book a Visit

Telehealth medical care across Florida. Cash pay, no insurance. Same-week appointments.
